item.title: MIUI V14.0.22.12.5.DEV Fastboot update for Xiaomi 12S China
item.description:
New Public Beta Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 12S China

Codename: mayfly

Version: V14.0.22.12.5.DEV | 13.0

Bug fixes and system optimizations.

Download: Here
